questions.explanation: India is famous for its 'Unity in Diversity' - despite differences in language, religion, and culture, Indians live together in harmony.

questions.text: All Indians speak the same language.
questions.explanation: India has hundreds of languages. Hindi and English are official languages, but there are 22 scheduled languages and many more dialects.

questions.text: Name any two festivals celebrated in India.
questions.correctAnswer: Diwali and Eid (or any two Indian festivals)
questions.explanation: India celebrates numerous festivals including Diwali, Eid, Christmas, Holi, Eid-ul-Fitr, Pongal, Baisakhi, etc., reflecting its religious diversity.

questions.text: ________ means accepting and respecting differences among people.
questions.explanation: Tolerance means accepting and respecting the differences in opinions, beliefs, and practices of others, even when they differ from our own.
